rationale: In the citing paper, Katona, Zubcsek, and Sarvary (2011) appears only once in a grouped citation listing prior work on opinion leaders/influentials in customer networks. The text does not discuss that paper's specific model, findings, or measures, and it is not used directly for hypothesis derivation, parameterization, or interpretation of results. The citing study develops its own agent-based framework and empirical network simulations without a distinct functional dependence on this particular source.
